item.title: NXP i.MX 937 cost-effective Cortex-A55/M7/M33 MPU is a drop-in replacement for NXP i.MX 95 SoC family

probe.description: The 1 .4 GHz NXP i.MX 937 quad-core Cortex-A55 microprocessor (MPU) for HMI and Edge AI applications aims to fill the gap between entry-level NXP i.MX 93
